hooks: The BTC treasury playbook is proven. The next evolution is earning yield while holding.
19 public companies now hold ETH. The treasury revolution is just starting.
Saylor had to sell $216M BTC. ETH treasuries won't have to.
eth_treasury.cta: What do you think — will ETH treasuries follow the BTC playbook?

hooks: McKinsey says $3-5T in agentic commerce by 2030.
